---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new DPFTS guide, recipe, checklist, or example
title: "[Feature]: "

assignees: ""

## What should DPFTS add?

Describe the guide, recipe, checklist, or example.

## Roblox use case

What kind of Roblox developer or system would this help?

## Safety concerns

Could this involve currency, inventory, purchases, rewards, admin actions, trading, teleports, badges, or player data?

## Suggested file

Example: `deep/security.md`, `recipes/new-system.md`, `examples/PROMPTS.md`
